metadata.description: Deploys an Azure Container Instance running PowerShell that sends random test emails via SMTP AUTH (smtp.office365.com). Requires an M365 mailbox with SMTP AUTH enabled.
SMTP server hostname for authenticated submission. Use smtp.office365.com for Exchange Online SMTP AUTH.
SMTP username (typically the sender email address).
URL to download the Random_Content.zip file containing ebook.txt, MOV, MP3, and JPG folders.
Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses.
Sender email address (must match the SMTP username mailbox).
Number of emails to send to each recipient.
Percentage of emails that will include a threat test payload - GTUBE spam string, phishing test URL, or EICAR test attachment (0-100).
